root_cause_summary: The uniqueness key was used by an earlier request that successfully created the contract.
root_cause_details: The retry returned HTTP 409 because the same uniqueness key was submitted again after the original contract creation had already succeeded. The investigation found the existing contract rather than a new validation failure.
resolution_summary: Retrieved the existing contract and advised the customer to reuse the original result instead of retrying with the same uniqueness key.
resolution_steps: Searched API logs for the uniqueness key enterprise-contract-001.
Retrieved the existing contract created by the previous request.
Compared the existing contract customer and pricing details with the retried payload.
verification_steps: Verify API logs for the original request.
Verify the existing contract can be retrieved.
Verify the customer does not need a second contract.
verification_results: API logs showed the previous operation succeeded before the retry.
The existing contract matched the customer and intended rate card.
The customer accepted the existing contract as the correct final state.
